license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u8iezue
title: DNA recovery from filter paper
author: Diego Bonatto

steps_raw.instruction: To recover the plasmid, use a clean razor blade to cut out one of the circles containing your DNA.
Immerse the circle in 30 µL of TE buffer Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher and pipette to mix.
After waiting for at least 00:10:00 , use 2 µL to transform competent bacteria.
